description.short: GM INN HOTEL places two travelers in the heart of Banda Aceh, close to the Baiturrahman Grand Mosque, the tsunami museum and lively local markets. Comfortable, air‑conditioned rooms offer city or garden views, a minibar refrigerator, complimentary bottled water and toiletries, plus free Wi‑Fi. Enjoy in‑room breakfast and on‑demand room service, dine at the hotel restaurant, or unwind with professional massage treatments—ideal for two travelers seeking a convenient, relaxed base to explore Acehnese culture and the coast. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Dear Mr Nashrullah

Salam Hangat dari GM INN Hotel By Calandra Banda Aceh.

Sebelumnya kami ucapkan terimakasih banyak telah memilih GM INN Hotel By Calandra Banda Aceh sebagai rumah kedua anda, Terima kasih karena telah meluangkan waktunya untuk menuliskan pengalaman selama menginap di hotel kami. Suatu kebanggan bagi kami karena anda memiliki pengalaman yang berkesan serta dapat menikmati suasana dan fasilitas hotel kami. untuk itu kami berusaha semaksimal mungkin meningkatkan kualitas pelayanan dan kenyamanan Tamu.

Kami sangat berharap dengan kedatangan anda Kembali di GM INN Hotel By Calandra Banda Aceh.

Best Regards,

Andik Bambang Sumantri.

GM INN Hotel By Calandra.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The staff at GM Inn Hotel are super friendly, the food is delicious, and cleanliness is maintained with towels, sheets, and the room. The location is strategic, close to laundry, pharmacies, etc., so when we go back, we don’t have to carry a lot of laundry 🤭. It’s really close to places to eat, and there are so many options to choose from. And when looking for souvenirs, just walk a little, and there’s a souvenir shop, so no need to drive around. The main highlight of this hotel is the service; all the staff are friendly, kind, and really help when we need something. Thank you very much 🫶🏻.
comments.originalComment: Staff Hotel GM Inn super ramah, makanannya enak-enak, kebersihan terjaga seperti handuk, seperi, kamar. Lokasinya strategis, dekat laundry, apotek, dll.. jadi pulang kita ga banyak bawa cucian 🤭, deket banget sama tempat makan bahkan banyak banget tempat makan tinggal pilih mau apa, nah apalagi kalau cari oleh oleh, tinggal jalan dikit ada toko souvenir jadi ga usah puter puter. Utamanya pelayanan di hotel ini, semua staff ramah, baik dan bener bener ngebantu pas kita perlu sesuatu. Makasih banyak ya 🫶🏻

Very good coffee in the lobby - no problem to get it although it was Ramadan. Location is 15 min by car to the Ulelue ferry point.  Markets and restaurant are near.

We were frustrated to see our junior suite is different from what Agoga advertised. We booked the room when we saw it offers 1 twin AND queen bed. Yet when we arrived the staff said Agoda is the one who tricked us. They never had such arrangement and we were given with 1 bed.

The bathroom is terrible, moldy with faulty door. The door handle felt down from time to time. Strong cigarettes odour filled the room so badly and disturbing. Yet we have no option and had to settle down as it was late night already. We are both female and do not dare to find alternatives. 
We went for breakfast but food were finished and the hotel did not replenished it 
All lead to frustration level 4.
